title: Device Request - Tuya Smart Temperature And Humidity Sensor- Tuya / CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01(7014)

diagComments.excerpt:
✅ SUPPORTED in v5.1.0

Tuya Smart Temperature And Humidity Sensor CK-TLSR8656-SS5-01 supported.

**Location:** climate_monitor_temp_humidity, temperature_sensor

Standard Tuya temp/humidity sensors use DP1 (temp) and DP2 (humidity).
